zh.Merheim, Köln, Nordrhein-Westfalen, Duit: 德國諾爾德海-維斯特法倫可爾梅海姆
zh.Merheim, Köln, North Rhine-Westphalia, G: 德國諾爾德海-維斯特法倫可爾梅海姆
zh.lifeSummary: 當Rutger Koenraadsz van Merum於大約1141年出生在德國諾爾德海-維斯特法倫可爾梅海姆時，他的父親Konrad II von Merheim27歲，母親Heilwige van Roode25歲。他與Aleidis van Horne結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他於1189年登記服兵役。他去世於1192年在荷蘭努-布拉班特可享年52歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Rutger Koenraadsz van Merum于大约1141年出生在德国諾爾德海-維斯特法倫可爾梅海姆时，他的父亲Konrad II von Merheim27岁，母亲Heilwige van Roode25岁。他与Aleidis van Horne结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他于1189年登记服兵役。他去世于1192年在荷兰努-布拉班特可享年52岁。

nameMeanings.name: van
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Vietnamese Anh, Thanh, Hung, Minh, Vinh, Dung, Hue, Huong, Lan, Quang, Tan, Thuy, Hong, Chi, Hang, Ho, Pok, Sang, Bai, Chin, Ching, Chu, Chuan, Dong.
Vietnamese (Vạn): from the Chinese surname 萬, see Wan 1.
Vietnamese (Văn): from the Chinese surnames 文 or 聞, see Wen 2 and 3, and also 5 below.

variants.name: Wan
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese Hong, Yi, Qi, Qiang, Wai, Yiu, Yuk, Chien-Min, Fang, Hin, Jichun, Li, Man, Chung, Min, Yiping, Pak, Sik, Sung Man.  Vietnamese Tin, Bang, Da, Hien, Hoi, Lan, Minh Quang, Sau, Tich, Tung, Yaping, Yuet.

Chinese: Mandarin form of the surname 萬, which means ‘ten thousand’ literally or ‘very great number’ figuratively: (i) from the personal name of Bi Wan (畢萬), an official in the state of Jin (located in present-day Shanxi province). He was said to be a descendant of Bi Gong Gao (known as Duke of Bi), the 15th son of the virtuous King Wen of Zhou (reined 1152–1056  BC ). Bi Wan was later granted the fiefdom of Wei (魏), which in 403  BC  became the state of Wei (located in present-day Shanxi, Shaanxi, Henan and Hebei provinces). Some of his descendants adopted Wei (魏) as their surname, while others inherited 萬 (Wan), his personal name, as their surname. (ii) from the personal name Wan (萬), style name of Rui Bo (芮伯, the Earl of Rui), an official of the Western Zhou dynasty (1046–771  BC ), who was granted the fief Rui (located in Ruicheng in Shaanxi province). Some of his descendants inherited Rui (芮), the name of the fief, as their surname, while others inherited 萬 (Wan), his style name, as their surname. (iii) from the placename Wan (萬), the name of a fief (located in Juxian in Shandong province) granted during the Spring and Autumn period (770–476  BC ) to an official in the ancient state of Chu. (iv) from the first element of the name of the Wan Si (萬俟) family, who lived in the downstream areas of the Yellow River during the Northern Qi dynasty (550–577  AD ). (v) from the second element of the name of the Tu Wan (吐萬) family, who are members of the Xianbei ethnic group in northern China.

Chinese: Mandarin form of the surname 完, meaning ‘complete’ in Chinese: (i) said to be borne by the descendants of Huan Zhui, a grandson of the Duke Huan of Song (ruler of the state of Song, died 651  BC ). (ii) from Wan (完), the name of Qu Wan (屈完), an official in the state of Chu during the Spring and Autumn Period (770–476  BC ). (iii) shortened form of the compound surname Wan-Yan (完顔), a surname from minority ethnic groups such as Juchen ethnic group in ancient northern China.

nameMeanings.name: Merum
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Scandinavian Erik, Nordahl, Vidar.
Norwegian: habitational name from any of several farmsteads namedLærum or Lerum, from Old Norse Leirheimr, a compound ofleira ‘clay’ + heimr ‘farmstead, dwelling’.

nameMeanings.name: Rutger
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Rüdiger
meanings: from hrōd ‘fame’ + gēr ‘spear’. This is the name of a hero in the Nibelungenlied. See Roger .

en.lifeSummary: When Rutger Koenraadsz van Merum was born about 1141, in Merheim, Köln, North Rhine-Westphalia, Germany, his father, Konrad II von Merheim, was 27 and his mother, Heilwige van Roode, was 25. He married Aleidis van Horne. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 2 daughters. He registered for military service in 1189. He died in 1192, in Cuijk, North Brabant, Netherlands, at the age of 52.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Rutger Koenraadsz van Merum est né environ 1141, à Merheim, Köln, Nordrhein-Westfalen, Allemagne, son père, Konrad II von Merheim, avait 27 ans et sa mère, Heilwige van Roode, avait 25 ans. Il a épousé Aleidis van Horne. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 2 filles. Il s'est inscrite au service militaire en 1189. Il est décédé en 1192, à Cuijk, Brabant-septentrional, Pays-Bas, à l’âge de 52 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Rutger Koenraadsz van Merum um 1141 in Merheim, Köln, Nordrhein-Westfalen, Deutschland geboren wurde, war sein Vater Konrad II von Merheim 27 und seine Mutter Heilwige van Roode 25. Er hat Aleidis van Horne geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er hat sich 1189 zum Militärdienst angemeldet. Er starb 1192 im Alter von 52 Jahren in Cuijk, Nord-Brabant, Niederlande.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Rutger Koenraadsz van Merum è nato il circa 1141 nel Merheim, Köln, Nordrhein-Westfalen, Germania, il suo padre, Konrad II von Merheim, aveva 27 anni e il suo madre, Heilwige van Roode, aveva 25 anni. Lui sposato Aleidis van Horne. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 2 figlie. Si è arruolato nell'esercito nel 1189. Morì nel 1192, nel Cuijk, Brabante settentrionale, Paesi Bassi, all'età di 52 anni.

ja.Merheim, Köln, Nordrhein-Westfalen, Duit: ドイツノードルヘイン-ウエストファレンクoルンメルヘイム
ja.Merum, Limburg, Netherlands: オランダリンブルグメルム
ja.Merheim, Köln, North Rhine-Westphalia, G: ドイツノードルヘイン-ウエストファレンクoルンメルヘイム
ja.Cuijk, North Brabant, Netherlands: オランダノオルド-ブラバントクウイジク
ja.lifeSummary: Rutger Koenraadsz van Merumが約1141年にドイツノードルヘイン-ウエストファレンクoルンメルヘイムで生まれた時，父Konrad II von Merheimは27歳，母Heilwige van Roodeは25歳であった。Aleidis van Horneと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1189年に兵役登録をした。彼は1192年にオランダノオルド-ブラバントクウイジクで52歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Rutger Koenraadsz van Merum(이)가 대략 1141년 독일 노르드하이-베스트파렌 ko 머하임에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Konrad II von Merheim(은)는 27세였고, 그의 어머니 Heilwige van Roode(은)는 25세였다. 그는 Aleidis van Horne(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1189년에 군복무를 위해 등록했다. 그는 1192년 네덜란드 노르드-브라반트 쿠이제이크에서 52세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.Cuijk, North Brabant, Netherlands: Cuijk, Brabante do Norte, Países Baixos
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Rutger Koenraadsz van Merum nasceu aproximadamente 1141, em Merheim, Köln, Nordrhein-Westfalen, Alemanha, seu pai, Konrad II von Merheim, tinha 27 anos e sua mãe, Heilwige van Roode, tinha 25 anos. Ele casou-se com Aleidis van Horne. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele alistou-se no serviço militar em 1189. Ele faleceu em 1192, em Cuijk, Brabante do Norte, Países Baixos, com 52 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Rutger Koenraadsz van Merum родился около 1141 г. в местности мирим, кoлн, нордраин-вестфеилен, Германия, его отцу по имени Konrad II von Merheim было 27 лет, а матери, которую звали Heilwige van Roode, 25. Он женился на женщине по имени Aleidis van Horne. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 2 дочери. В 1189 году он поступил на военную службу. Он умер в 1192 г. в местности куиджк, нурд-брабант, Нидерланды в возрасте 52 лет.

sm.1147-1212: mai le 1147 e o'o I le 1212

es.Cuijk, North Brabant, Netherlands: Cuijk, Brabante del Norte, Países Bajos
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Rutger Koenraadsz van Merum nació aproximadamente 1141, en Merheim, Köln, Nordrhein-Westfalen, Alemania, su papá, Konrad II von Merheim, tenía 27 años y su mamá, Heilwige van Roode, tenía 25 años. Se casó con Aleidis van Horne. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 2 hijas. Se enlistó en el ejército en 1189. Murió en 1192, en Cuijk, Brabante del Norte, Países Bajos, a la edad de 52 años.
